name: Country Style Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds pork shoulder or fresh picnic, or other pork roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the ginger, garlic powder, sage, salt, and pepper.
2. Rub the spice mixture evenly over the surface of the 5-pound pork roast.
3. Place the roast on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
4. Roast in an oven preheated to 325°F until the internal temperature reaches 185°F, which should take approximately 3½ to 4 hours.
5. After cooking, you can make gravy using the pan drippings.
